name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC workflow with integrated code review, unified design system, Diátaxis documentation, analysis, observability, and git lifecycle. 32 lifecycle commands (10 stages + wf-design [22 sub-commands] + wf-next + wf-status + wf-resume + wf-sync + wf-announce + wf-amend + wf-extend + wf-ideate + wf-how + wf-quick + wf-rca + wf-investigate + wf-discover + wf-instrument + wf-experiment + wf-benchmark + wf-profile + wf-skip + wf-close) with branch-aware git operations, wf-validate pre-write hook, 31 review commands, 7 aggregate reviews, 15 skills (design dispatcher + imagegen + 4 analysis + 7 Diátaxis + wf-profile), and setup-wide-logging command. v8.19: wf-investigate — investment discovery. v8.20: wf-discover — problem validation. v8.21: wf-instrument — observability augmentation. v8.22: wf-experiment — experiment design augmentation. v8.23: wf-benchmark — two-mode perf wrapper. v8.24: wf-profile skill + command. v8.25: wf-skip — skip a stage without running it. v8.26: wf-close — archive a workflow at any stage. v8.27: Unified wf-design — 14 standalone design-* skills and 5 wf-design* commands collapsed into a single wf-design command (22 sub-commands) backed by a skills/design/ dispatcher + 24 reference docs. New imagegen skill with capability waterfall. Imagegen probes in shape and craft. v8.28: SDLC-aware routing for wf-design. craft splits (workflow → 02c-craft.md visual contract; freestanding → writes code). 15 transformations register as augmentations. v8.29: Closed artifact-consumption gap — post-design stages now consume all design artifacts and every augmentation type with type-specific behavior. wf-implement adds instrumentation signals + experiment wiring as it codes; wf-verify re-runs type-specific checks per augmentation; wf-handoff/wf-ship translate augmentations to user-language. Visual contract enforced via § Visual Contract Honored (in 05-implement) and § Augmentation Verification (in 06-verify). Workflow-type awareness for compressed mode (wf-quick) and forwarded mode (wf-rca, wf-investigate). v8.30: Per-slice review artifacts. wf-review writes 07-review-<slice>.md and 07-review-<slice>-<command>.md instead of overwriting a single workflow-wide review. wf-handoff aggregates per-slice verdicts from frontmatter and refuses to proceed if any slice has unresolved blockers. Consumers updated across wf-implement reviews mode, wf-amend/wf-extend from-review, wf-retro, wf-ship, wf-skip, wf-status, wf-how findings.

interface.shortDescription: Structured feature delivery, review, and handoff workflows
interface.longDescription: Guided SDLC orchestration for intake, shaping, slicing, planning, implementation, verification, review, handoff, shipping, and retrospectives. Codex exposes the canonical Claude workflow commands through generated skill wrappers so the workflow stays installable without forking the source plugin.
defaultPrompt: Start a new SDLC workflow for this feature request.
Run the next SDLC stage for my active workflow.
Review this workflow slice and summarize the findings.
